offer: For insurance underwriters processing 5–15 policies/month, manual review causes delayed risk assessments. We aggregate policy data and flag coverage gaps instead of manual review of policy documents.
problem: Identifying coverage gaps in insurance policies
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for insurance underwriters
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows

Share insights in community forums for underwriters
try_it: Let users try policy data aggregation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Enable CSV import for existing data
